title: lance help
wikitext:
[]: lance help!!             Quote Post by chungdoo » Wed Jul 16, 2008 5:24 pm i am an author for a fan fiction on fan fiction.net and right now in my story i am having a fight scene between the three eva's and one MP eva. I want to know if you guys have any suggestions for beating a lance in battle. or blocking a lance that could work multiple times. Thanks for your help.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 16, 2008 6:13 pm block it with another lance.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 16, 2008 6:16 pm Throwing it? Get the hell out of the way and hope it doesn't adjust it's own flight path. Cover will not help, so don't bother diving behind anything. Using it in melee? Let him overcommit then get inside it's reach. Failing that, let it stab one eva in a non-vital spot and keep ahold the the thing while the other two evas kick it's ass. If you really need to block it, that hefty prog axe Asuka has in ep16 could probably come in handy.

[]:             Quote Post by chungdoo » Wed Jul 16, 2008 6:51 pm what about the MP Eva, can it regenerate itself because in the show they seemed not to die. what do you guys recommend?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 16, 2008 6:59 pm play more Gradius... SHOOT THE CORE!

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Jul 16, 2008 7:29 pm NemZ wrote: play more Gradius... SHOOT THE CORE!

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jul 16, 2008 7:47 pm The whole "gimmick" of the infamous Spear is that it's an unblockable weapon that can pierce anything, "even God". But that means that the strategies to get around that advantage can be made all the more interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 16, 2008 9:53 pm Monk Ed wrote: The whole "gimmick" of the infamous Spear is that it's an unblockable weapon that can pierce anything, "even God".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 16, 2008 11:33 pm chungdoo wrote: what about the MP Eva, can it regenerate itself because in the show they seemed not to die.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jul 17, 2008 12:12 am Reichu wrote: And they die the same as any Eva or Angel, as a result of the core being adequately damaged.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Thu Jul 17, 2008 12:40 am Gamer_2k4 wrote: Reichu wrote: And they die the same as any Eva or Angel, as a result of the core being adequately damaged.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jul 17, 2008 8:42 am Eh, we know Yui can do it, so why not them too? Unless that's some secret Lilith-based tech right there. Hmm... though why doesn't berserk Kyoko regenerate at the end?

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Jul 17, 2008 9:50 am Stick a Jesus in front of it!

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jul 17, 2008 10:40 am The Bastard King wrote: Stick a Jesus in front of it!

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Jul 17, 2008 11:02 am Do a barrel roll (press X twice) or use the boost to get through! Failing that, move evasively and try to take out the wielder before it throws.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 17, 2008 5:36 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: Reichu wrote: And they die the same as any Eva or Angel, as a result of the core being adequately damaged.
summary:
[]: lance help!!             Quote Post by chungdoo » Wed Jul 16, 2008 5:24 pm i am an author for a fan fiction on fan fiction.net and right now in my story i am having a fight scene between the three eva's and one MP eva. I want to know if you guys have any suggestions for beating a lance in battle. or blocking a lance that could work multiple times. Thanks for your help.

[]:           &nbs
